email_subject: Application for Communicatieverantwoordelijke at Atlas Copco Group
email_body:
Dear Tempo-Team,

I am writing to apply for the Communicatieverantwoordelijke position at Atlas Copco Group, as advertised via Tempo-Team. With a background in digital marketing, content creation, and international communication, I am excited about the opportunity to support the global transformation program.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write targeted content, and coordinate communication across multiple channels. I have experience creating newsletters, managing SharePoint, and developing presentations. My project mirook.com involved building a WordPress site with structured data and multilingual content, demonstrating my ability to handle complex information and tailor messages to diverse audiences.

I am fluent in English, have native Turkish, and am actively learning Dutch (A2). I am proactive, detail-oriented, and eager to contribute to the GEMS Business Engagement team. I am available to start immediately.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can add value to Atlas Copco Group.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Communicatieverantwoordelijke position at Atlas Copco Group, as advertised via Tempo-Team. With a strong foundation in digital communication, content creation, and international coordination, I am confident in my ability to support the global transformation program and engage diverse teams across China, Italy, Spain, and the UK.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and maintain WordPress websites. I have experience creating and distributing newsletters, managing content on SharePoint, and developing presentations. My role requires me to translate complex technical information into accessible content for various audiences, a skill directly relevant to this position.

On my own project, mirook.com, I designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, implemented structured data, and optimized content for both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This involved coordinating with stakeholders, planning content calendars, and ensuring consistent branding—all key responsibilities of the Communicatieverantwoordelijke role.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively learning Dutch (A2). I am proficient in PowerPoint, SharePoint, and Forms, and I am quick to adapt to new tools. I bring a proactive, positive attitude and a collaborative mindset, eager to contribute to the GEMS Business Engagement team.

I am inspired by Atlas Copco's culture of innovation and development, and I am ready to take on the challenge of shaping internal communication for a global program. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can support your team.

Warm regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
• Experienced in creating and coordinating newsletters, presentations, and communication materials for diverse audiences
• Proficient in SharePoint, PowerPoint, and Forms for content management and collaboration
• Strong English communication skills (fluent) with additional languages (Turkish native, Dutch A2)
• Proven ability to manage international projects and coordinate with remote teams
• Skilled in translating complex information into accessible, engaging content
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Content · Communication
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and content creation. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com), I applied structured data and entity optimization to improve search visibility. Experienced in creating newsletters, managing SharePoint, and developing presentations. Comfortable coordinating communication across international teams and tailoring messages to different audiences. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Communication & content: newsletter creation, editorial content writing, SharePoint management, PowerPoint presentations, Forms, communication planning
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
